fields.summary: [FederationStateStore] Create a proxy chain for FederationStateStore API in the Router

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
status.name: Open

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description: As detailed in the proposal in the umbrella JIRA, we are introducing a new component that routes client request to appropriate FederationStateStore. This JIRA tracks the creation of a proxy for FederationStateStore in the Router.

comments.body: Attached a first version of it - still a prototype. [~elgoiri] do you mind take a look?

Thanks [~giovanni.fumarola] for [^YARN-7898-YARN-7402.proto.patch].

I think this concept is useful for caching accesses to the State Store; right now you are relying on the caching at the State Store Facade in the Router, right?

In addition to the REST interface, it might be useful to do the equivalent in RPC. It might be simpler to start with the RPC actually to get rid of a lot of the Web specific stuff.

Thanks [~elgoiri]. Yes we are relying on the StateStore Facade in the Router for caching.

We can open a different Jira to work on RPC since it will require extra work for the protocol.

I will let Yetus run the [^YARN-7898-YARN-7402.proto.patch].

comments.body: Attached a first version of it - still a prototype. [~elgoiri] do you mind take a look?

Thanks [~giovanni.fumarola] for [^YARN-7898-YARN-7402.proto.patch].

I think this concept is useful for caching accesses to the State Store; right now you are relying on the caching at the State Store Facade in the Router, right?

In addition to the REST interface, it might be useful to do the equivalent in RPC. It might be simpler to start with the RPC actually to get rid of a lot of the Web specific stuff.

Thanks [~elgoiri]. Yes we are relying on the StateStore Facade in the Router for caching.

We can open a different Jira to work on RPC since it will require extra work for the protocol.

I will let Yetus run the [^YARN-7898-YARN-7402.proto.patch].
